packages.name: hello
packages.summary: Minimal greet function; canonical URL-import example.

packages.name: greeter
packages.summary: Two-file package; demonstrates recursive URL-relative imports.

packages.name: args
packages.summary: Command-line flag and option parsing (hasFlag, optionValue, positional).

packages.name: mathx
packages.summary: Integer math helpers: gcd, lcm, ipow, isPrime, clampInt.

packages.name: quickjs
packages.summary: Embed a QuickJS JavaScript sandbox via FFI; set/eval/get values across the boundary.

packages.name: sqlite
packages.summary: Typed SQLite access via FFI; open/exec/query int and text over a C shim.

packages.name: markdown
packages.summary: Pure-Lumen Markdown -> HTML renderer (no FFI); render(md).

packages.name: semver
packages.summary: Semantic Versioning parser, comparator, incrementer, and range evaluator.

packages.name: toml
packages.summary: Practical TOML parser/stringifier for sections, dotted keys, typed values, and simple arrays.

packages.name: csv
packages.summary: CSV parser/stringifier with quoted fields, CRLF, row helpers, and flat arrays.

packages.name: ai
packages.summary: Typed AI helpers for OpenAI-compatible chat APIs.

packages.name: token-gate
packages.summary: Token-optimizing command proxy (tkg): dedupe, ANSI-strip, truncate, git-status grouping.

packages.name: code-index
packages.summary: Compact codebase symbol index (cidx): map, find, outline for AI navigation.
